action_set_definitions.name: get_trip_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the trip, including total budget, current spent amount, existing itinerary items, and traveler preferences.

action_set_definitions.name: search_flights
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for available flights between two airports on a specific date. Returns flight IDs, prices, and the Lowest Reasonable Airfare (LRA) for variance calculation.

origin.description: IATA code for the departure airport (e.g., 'JFK').

destination.description: IATA code for the arrival airport (e.g., 'LHR').

date.description: The date of travel in YYYY-MM-DD format.

action_set_definitions.name: book_flight
action_set_definitions.description: Books a flight and updates the spent amount and itinerary. Fails if the budget is exceeded.

flight_id.description: The unique ID of the flight to book.

action_set_definitions.name: search_hotels
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for hotels in a specific city within a per-diem price cap.

max_nightly_rate.description: The maximum allowed price per night.

action_set_definitions.name: book_hotel
action_set_definitions.description: Books a hotel and updates the spent amount and itinerary.

hotel_id.description: The unique ID of the hotel to book.

total_price.description: The total cost for the stay.

action_set_definitions.name: sync_duty_of_care
action_set_definitions.description: Synchronizes all confirmed itinerary items with the corporate Duty of Care tracking system.

itinerary_ids.description: List of booking references to sync.

state_description.total_budget: The total monetary limit for the entire trip.
state_description.spent_amount: Total amount spent on bookings so far.
state_description.current_city: The current geographic location of the traveler.
state_description.itinerary_items: A list of confirmed bookings, including flights, hotels, and activities.
state_description.calendar_slots: A mapping of dates to booked activity types to prevent scheduling conflicts.

traveler_preferences: preferred_suppliers: British Airways, Air France, Marriott
cabin_class: Business Class allowed for transatlantic
